title: Basic FFT MicroSim
description: A basic demonstration of FFT with time domain visualization on the top and frequency domain on the bottom, featuring adjustable frequency and amplitude controls.
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: Signal Processing
FFT
Fourier Transform
Frequency Analysis
learningObjectives: Understand the key concepts of basic fft
Explore basic fft through interactive visualization
Apply knowledge of basic fft to solve problems
Experiment with parameters to observe their effects on basic fft
